topics: Root Finding Methods (Derivation or proof not required) Bisection method
Convergence and error analysis of root-finding methods. Solving nonlinear equations using the above methods in Python

Interpolation (Derivation or proof not required) Finite difference interpolation, Newton's finite and backward difference interpolation methods. Polynomial Interpolation, Lagrange interpolation and Newton’s divided difference interpolation. Spline Interpolation, Cubic splines and B-splines. Error analysis in interpolation. Implementing interpolation methods in Python
Numerical Integration and Differentiation Numerical Differentiation, Finite difference methods

Error analysis in numerical differentiation. Numerical Integration, Trapezoidal rule, Simpson’s rule, Gaussian quadrature, Adaptive quadrature methods. Writing Python programs to perform numerical differentiation and integration
Solution of Ordinary Differential Equations Initial Value Problems, Euler’s method
Multistep methods (Adams-Bashforth and Adams-Moulton methods). Boundary Value Problems, Shooting method
Finite difference method. Solving ODEs using Python
